'''Cheryl Trinja''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]]. She was orphaned on a lightly-populated [[Farm/Legends|farming]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] when her parents were [[Death/Legends|killed]] during [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] military action. She grew up alone in a forest, where her natural [[The Force/Legends|Force]] ability manifested itself in unusual ways. She could easily send thoughts to the forest animals, and as such the animals cared and provided for her as she grew up.

At the age of seven, [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] tried to capture her, and Cheryl was forced to defend herself using the most brutal carnivores in the forest. In the second such battle, while Cheryl was watching her friends die to protect her, she was rescued from the Imperials by a group of traders.

Cheryl joined up with the traders and left the planet. She was given the nickname "the Natural". Where she later traveled was unknown.
